%%% TABLE 1: Payload size comparison
\begin{table}[ht]
\centering
\caption{Payload size: CDR (fixed binary) vs JSON (text, varies with numeric precision).}
\label{tab:payload_size}
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
\begin{tabular}{lrrr}
\toprule
\textbf{Message type} & \textbf{CDR (B)} & \textbf{JSON (B)} & \textbf{Ratio} \\
\midrule
NavSatFix & 128 & 294 & 2.3$\times$ \\
Odometry (zero cov.) & 724 & 702 & 1.0$\times$ \\
Odometry (full cov.) & 724 & 1927 & 2.7$\times$ \\
PointCloud2 (10k pts) & 160\,145 & 563\,625 & 3.5$\times$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

%%% TABLE 2: Serialization latency at 10 Hz
\begin{table}[ht]
\centering
\caption{Serialization latency at 10\,Hz (mean over 3 repetitions, 60\,s each).}
\label{tab:serialize_latency}
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{3pt}
\begin{tabular}{llrrrr}
\toprule
\textbf{Message type} & \textbf{Format} & \textbf{Avg} & \textbf{P95} & \textbf{P99} & \textbf{Slowdown} \\
\midrule
NavSatFix & CDR & 5.6 & 6.5 & 9.5 & --- \\
 & JSON & 72.2 & 89.2 & 107.7 & 13$\times$ \\
\addlinespace
Odometry (zero cov.) & CDR & 6.1 & 8.1 & 15.1 & --- \\
 & JSON & 134.4 & 190.6 & 234.1 & 22$\times$ \\
\addlinespace
Odometry (full cov.) & CDR & 5.5 & 6.7 & 7.9 & --- \\
 & JSON & 97.7 & 123.2 & 137.2 & 18$\times$ \\
\addlinespace
PointCloud2 (10k pts) & CDR & 0.01 & 0.02 & 0.03 & --- \\
 & JSON & 5.74 & 7.38 & 8.79 & 490$\times$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\begin{flushleft}
\footnotesize All values in \textmu s except PointCloud2 (ms).
\end{flushleft}
\end{table}

%%% TABLE 3: Serialization throughput at 500 Hz
\begin{table}[ht]
\centering
\caption{Serialization throughput at 500\,Hz.}
\label{tab:throughput}
\small
\begin{tabular}{lrrr}
\toprule
\textbf{Message type} & \textbf{CDR (MB/s)} & \textbf{JSON (MB/s)} & \textbf{Ratio} \\
\midrule
NavSatFix & 94.3 & 12.3 & 8$\times$ \\
Odometry (zero cov.) & 768.1 & 25.4 & 30$\times$ \\
Odometry (full cov.) & 739.2 & 62.5 & 12$\times$ \\
PointCloud2 (10k pts) & 25\,693 & 127.3 & 202$\times$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[ht]

\toprule

Odometry (full cov.) & 724 & 1927 & \texttt{0.025...} (8--12 chars/entry) \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textit{Size increase}} & $+175\%$ JSON, $+0\%$ CDR \\
